mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification ( notiId, receiverId, senderId, senderName, notiType, title, message, targetType, targetId, targetUrl, moveType, isRead, regDate ) VALUES ( notificationSeq.NEXTVAL, #{receiverId}, #{senderId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{senderName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{notiType}, #{title}, #{message, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{moveType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT n.* FROM notification n WHERE n.receiverId = #{receiverId} ORDER BY n.regDate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE receiverId = #{receiverId} AND isRead = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET isRead = 'Y' WHERE receiverId = #{receiverId} AND isRead = 'N'
